_comment: LIVE execution profile for the on-chain proof run on Mantle. Selected via STRATEGY_CONFIG=config/strategy.live.json. Only MNT->USDC is enabled (the wallet holds native MNT); single-trade cap is small (4 MNT ~= $3) so each autonomous decision leaves a cheap, real, verifiable trace on Mantle. The demo's source-of-truth config (config/strategy.json) is left untouched.
